next_action: keep pilot deferred; do not invite participants, open access channels, open waitlists, open beta, collect personal data, claim market validation, promise support, claim legal clearance, accept payment, publish externally, or deploy without later governed witness evidence

Rollback and exit questions only; no recovery readiness or incident readiness is claimed.
Success metric questions only; no market validation, product-market proof, or customer readiness is claimed.
Legal and terms questions only; no legal clearance, terms readiness, company authority, or paid pilot is claimed.
Public claim questions only; no external publication, pilot readiness, launch readiness, or deployment is claimed.
